questions.question_text: Answer the following questions. Write short note on: a Sustainable Development 2.5 b Cradle to cradle approach 2.5 c Sustainability Indicators 2.5 d Human Needs 2.5 e Resource Management 2.5 f Public Participation Approach 2.5 g Environmental Ethics 2.5 h Green Technology 2.5
Explain why the Indian Real Estate Industry needs a Life Cycle thinking and a Circular Economy 10
List down major global challenges of Sustainable Development 10
List all 17 SDG’s and briefly describe SDG 6 and SDG 11 10
Explain the concept of Sustainability Science with suitable example 10
Discuss Landscape Ecology w.r.t the Yamuna Riverfront Development Project in Delhi 10
Write short essay on Watershed Management 10
Discuss LiFE initiative of Government of India and its importance in achieving SDG goals 10
What role does education and awareness play in promoting sustainable development? 10
